shortDescription: Modern three-storey townhouse in Liberty Village with rooftop terrace and integrated single-car garage.
fullDescription: This contemporary three-storey townhouse delivers stylish, low-maintenance living in one of Toronto's most dynamic neighbourhoods. The ground floor features an integrated single-car garage plus a den that doubles as a home office. The second floor is an airy open-concept living, dining, and kitchen space with engineered hardwood floors, a sleek white kitchen with stainless appliances and breakfast bar, and a Juliet balcony overlooking the street. The top floor houses three bedrooms including a primary suite with walk-in closet, four-piece ensuite, and access to a private rooftop terrace with skyline views. Well-run condo corporation with low fees covering exterior maintenance and snow removal. Walk to King West restaurants, Exhibition Place, and the Liberty Village transit hub.
keyFeatures: Three-storey layout with private rooftop terrace
Primary suite with walk-in closet and ensuite
Den / home office on ground floor
Low condo fees — exterior maintenance included
Minutes to King West, Exhibition Place, and GO Transit
